description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows builds (basic) that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job that runs on different Windows environments (2019 and 2022), with different platforms (Win32 and x64), build types (Debug and Release), and C++ standards (14 and 17). For each matrix combination, check out the repository, configure a build with CMake, build tests in parallel, and run tests with CTest.
